note_text: Wound note - Rightbuttock. Meas 9.2x4.6x2.7cm. Heavy serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 74% gran, 26% slough. Periwound erythematous. Alginate dsg applied. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Castillo notified.
Wound note - Rightbuttock. Meas 9.2x4.6x2.7cm. Heavy serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 35% gran, 65% slough. Periwound macerated. Collagen dsg changed. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Nakamura notified.
